props.name: controls
props.description: Adding in the previous and next controls.

props.name: dark
props.description: Add darker controls, indicators, and captions.

props.name: indicators
props.description: Adding indicators at the bottom of the carousel for each item.

props.name: interval
props.description: The amount of time to delay between automatically cycling an item. If false, carousel will not automatically cycle.

props.name: pause
props.description: If set to 'hover', pauses the cycling of the carousel on mouseenter and resumes the cycling of the carousel on mouseleave. If set to false, hovering over the carousel won't pause it.

props.name: touch
props.description: Set whether the carousel should support left/right swipe interactions on touchscreen devices.

props.name: wrap
props.description: Set whether the carousel should cycle continuously or have hard stops.

events.name: slide
events.description: Event called when the slide transition starts.

events.name: slid
events.description: Event called when the slide transition ends.
